programs.title: Ice Road Truckers
programs.desc: In the midst of the early thaw, Darrell and Lisa struggle to make it home over the hardest hit trail on the winter roads system. Art and the King of Obsolete reunite to haul a giant double trailer over a slick path. Veteran Alex Debogorski races against the clock to deliver to a town in need before the road closes, while fellow Polar driver Todd Burke finds a unique way to conquer a melted ice crossing.

programs.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programs.desc: The Bushmen bring in a master opal cutter, hoping to transform rough stones into a $100,000 haul.  Sofia and Isaac from the Opal Whisperers are threatened by a mine roof collapse as they struggle to extract opal from crumbling walls.

programs.title: Lobstermania: The Deep Dive
programs.desc: Lobstermania: The Deep Dive explores the highs and lows of Tasmania's lobster hunting season through the lens of a core cast of three charismatic lobster boat skippers.

programs.title: Kindig Customs
programs.desc: Deep down, KevDogg is a truck guy, so when a truck show comes through town, he takes the reins and shows Dave what is what with all the great builds.
